name: Green Pepper Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the peppers and remove stems and seeds. Cut into 1/2 inch squares.
2. Puree half of the peppers and 3/4 cup vinegar in a blender or food processor.
3. Puree the remaining peppers and vinegar separately.
4. Combine the pureed mixture with apple juice in a large bowl. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
5. Strain the mixture through several thicknesses of damp cheesecloth.
6. Measure 4 cups juice into a large saucepan. If needed, add water to reach 4 cups.
7. Stir salt and pectin into the juice. Bring to a rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
8. Add sugar and return to a rolling boil. Boil hard for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from heat and skim foam if necessary. (Add food coloring, if desired.)
10. Pour hot jelly into sterilized jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace. Adjust lids.
11. Process jars in boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
Yield: about 6 half pints.
